responseBody.name: rideshare-fares
responseBody.description: Standardized fare/payment information for rideshare services. Not all providers expose this data.
responseBody.label: Rideshare Fares

fields.name: phone_number
fields.description: Phone number associated with the user's account.

fields.name: ride_timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of the associated ride (for joining with rides data).

fields.name: fare_currency
fields.description: Currency code used for the fare (ISO 4217).

fields.name: fare_amount
fields.description: Total fare amount charged for the ride.

fields.name: tip_amount
fields.description: Tip amount given to the driver.

responseBody.note: Contains fare and payment information. Currently populated by Uber data. Lyft does not expose this information in their standard data exports.

responseBody.name: rideshare-rider-profile
responseBody.description: Standardized rider profile information across rideshare services (Uber, Lyft, etc.).
responseBody.label: Rideshare Rider Profile

fields.name: first_name
fields.description: Given name of the user.

fields.name: last_name
fields.description: Family name of the user.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email address associated with the user's account.

fields.name: phone_number
fields.description: Phone number associated with the user's account.

fields.name: date_of_birth
fields.description: Date of birth of the user.

responseBody.note: Combines user profile data from Uber and Lyft into a standardized format.

responseBody.name: rideshare-rides
responseBody.description: Standardized ride/trip information across rideshare services (Uber, Lyft, etc.). Excludes fare information - see standard_fares schema.
responseBody.label: Rideshare Rides

fields.name: phone_number
fields.description: Phone number associated with the user's account.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City where the ride took place.

fields.name: product_type
fields.description: Product category for the ride (e.g., UberX, Lyft Standard).

fields.name: status
fields.description: Ride status (e.g., completed, canceled).

fields.name: requested_timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp when the ride was requested.

responseBody.note: Combines ride/trip data from Uber and Lyft. Fare information is separated into standard_fares schema since not all providers include this data.

responseBody.name: rideshare-saved-locations
responseBody.description: Standardized saved locations/shortcuts across rideshare services (Uber, Lyft, etc.).
responseBody.label: Rideshare Saved Locations

fields.name: phone_number
fields.description: Phone number associated with the user's account.

fields.name: location_label
fields.description: User-provided label for the saved location (e.g., Home, Work, Gym).

fields.name: street_address
fields.description: Formatted number and street address of the saved location.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City of the saved address.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State or province of the saved address.

responseBody.note: Combines saved locations from Uber (rider_eater_saved_locations) and Lyft (user_shortcuts) into a standardized format.

responseBody.name: telecom-subscription
responseBody.description: Telecom subscription profile covering subscriber ownership and bundle metadata (Adobe XDM telecomSubscription).
responseBody.label: Telecom Subscription

fields.name: primary_subscriber
fields.description: Owner of the subscription (person reference).

fields.name: primary_party_id
fields.description: Identifier for the primary responsible party (typically a phone number).

fields.name: bundle_name
fields.description: Name of the subscription bundle (e.g., Internet + Media).

responseBody.note: Derived from Adobe XDM telecomSubscription root properties.

responseBody.explicacao: O roteiro indica endpoints de withdrawal e payment-settled/payment-failed, mas o sumário marca a etapa como API interna ainda não externalizada.
responseBody.impacto: APIs de resgate existem no roteiro como referência operacional, porém foram classificadas como INT; não devem ser executadas como externas nesta validação.

evidence.message: Etapa sinalizada como API não disponível para execução externa.
evidence.missingReason: APIs de resgate existem no roteiro como referência operacional, porém foram classificadas como INT; não devem ser executadas como externas nesta validação.
